algorithm_contract.description: The update must describe proposition layers and mutex tracking.

modality_boundary_note: Only model_facing is intended for model prompts; gold_scoring_metadata is evaluator-only.

model_facing.algorithm_definition: Graphplan: build proposition layers from the initial layer, add action/proposition layers, track mutex relations for incompatible propositions, and stop when non-mutex goals appear.

language_input.natural_language_goal: Achieve these Blocksworld goal atoms: on(a,b).

output_format.internal_state_update: one-step planner-state update for the requested algorithm

model_facing.system: You are executing graphplan on one Blocksworld task.
model_facing.task_instruction: Execute the next step of graphplan and respond only with JSON.
